# BlackPebble

> BlackPebble is a free Solana paper-trading platform. Users trade real, live Solana tokens with virtual SOL — practicing strategies and competing on leaderboards without risking real money. All prices and market data are live and on-chain; all balances and trades are simulated. BlackPebble never takes custody of real funds and never executes real swaps.

## Pages

- [Home / Trading Desk](https://blackpebble.fun/): Trade live Solana tokens with paper money.
- [Markets](https://blackpebble.fun/markets): Trending Solana tokens with live price, market cap, liquidity, and volume.
- [Portfolio](https://blackpebble.fun/portfolio): Open positions, realized and unrealized P&L, ROI, and trade history.
- [Leaderboard](https://blackpebble.fun/leaderboard): Traders ranked by realized P&L across daily, weekly, and all-time periods.
- [Utilities](https://blackpebble.fun/utilities): Standalone wallet tools, including SOL Recovery for reclaiming trapped rent.
- [About](https://blackpebble.fun/about): What BlackPebble is and how it works.
- [Features](https://blackpebble.fun/features): The full set of trading, planning, and portfolio features.
- [Roadmap](https://blackpebble.fun/roadmap): What is live today and what is planned next.

## Notes

- BlackPebble is for entertainment and education only and is not financial advice.
- Trading uses virtual SOL; no real money is ever at risk in the paper-trading experience.
- SOL Recovery is the only feature that interacts with a real wallet, and it operates entirely on-chain and separately from paper trading.
